heading: Omitted]
label: 4146, 4147 Omitted]
notes: CodificationSections 4146 and 4147 were initially transferred from sections 2368 and 2367 of this title, respectively, by , , , to become effective . Subsequently, , , , struck out and added a new , effective as if included therein. The new section 1844(b) did not direct any transfers to sections 4146 and 4147, thereby omitting these sections before they took effect. After other amendments by , sections 2368 and 2367 were transferred to sections 4124 and 4126 of this title, respectively.Pub. L. 116–283, div. A, title XVIII, § 1844(b)134 Stat. 4246Pub.
